heading: Repealed. [title IV, § 474(e)], ,Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983
label: 4511 to 4524 Repealed. [title IV, § 474(e)], ,Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983
notes: The new communities program was liquidated and its assets and liabilities transferred pursuant to sections 1701g–5a and 1701g–5b of Title 12, Banks and Banking.
Section 4511, , , , set out Congressional findings and purpose in setting up program for development of new communities.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 71084 Stat. 1793Dec. 31, 1970

Section 4517, , , , set limitations on guarantees and loans.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 71684 Stat. 1798Dec. 31, 1970

Section 4518, , , ; , , , created a revolving fund for use in connection with the new communities development program.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 71784 Stat. 1798Pub. L. 97–35, title III, § 339F95 Stat. 418Dec. 31, 1970Aug. 13, 1981

Section 4523, , , , directed Secretary to develop methods of encouraging involvement of small builders in new communities development program.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 72284 Stat. 1801Dec. 31, 1970

Savings Provision[title IV, § 474(e)], , , provided in part that:Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983“Section 717 of title VII [] shall remain in effect until completion of the transfer required in title I of the Department of Housing and Urban Development-Independent Agencies Appropriation Act, 1984 [].”42 U.S.C. 451812 U.S.C. 1701g–5aAny actions taken, prior to repeal, under the authority of sections 4511 to 4524 and 4528 to 4532 of this title to continue to be valid, with nothing in the repeal impairing the validity of any guarantees which have been made pursuant to this chapter and with such guarantees continuing to be governed by the provisions of this chapter, as it existed immediately before , see , set out in part as a note under .Nov. 30, 1983section 474(e) of Pub. L. 98–181section 3901 of this title
